meta.model: Gemini gemini-flash-lite-latest · US (and trains on free-tier prompts)

clusters.label: Payment processing errors and unissued tickets
Login loops, authentication errors, and password failures
Constant crashes, server errors, and lagging screens
Disappearing tickets and sync failures in digital wallet
Confusing redesign, clunky navigation, and missing options
Automated support walls and blocked refund requests
Language switching bugs and accessibility roadblocks

insights.title: The recent interface redesign introduced severe server timeout errors and sluggish navigation across core workflows.
insights.summary: Following the latest visual update, users experience continuous internal server errors and excessive loading times during basic tasks like searching for trains or viewing schedules. Commuters and tourists note that the application was previously fast and stable, but now requires numerous attempts to complete simple actions. These recurring interruptions make spontaneous travel planning nearly impossible and risk causing passengers to miss their trains. Optimizing backend query performance and resolving rendering bottlenecks from the new UI layout are critical to restoring usability.

evidence.quote: dopo l’ultimo aggiornamento per prendere un biglietto ci impiego mezz’ora perché ogni volta da errore di server, si blocca e mi fa tornare indietro. Una persona per una operazione…

evidence.name: DT
evidence.quote: The new app is horrendous - the ticket and searches take forever to load, it's absolutely maddening. Did Trenitalia hire a 13 year old to design the app ? UPDATE 6/2026 The app…

evidence.name: NB
evidence.quote: Bello il nuovo design, vero? Peccato che ora l'usabilità generale FACCIA CAGARE: Ho provato per 15 minuti (15!) ad acquistare un normalissimo biglietto regionale, peccato che sia…

insights.recommendation: Optimize backend endpoints and streamline the interface rendering logic to eliminate frequent server timeout errors and reduce page load times.

insights.title: Payment gateways report failures while successfully debiting user accounts, leaving travelers ticketless.
insights.summary: Users repeatedly report that checkout screens throw error messages or fail to redirect properly after authorization, yet banking notifications confirm the money was taken. Because the app displays a transaction failure notice, riders often purchase a second ticket or risk fines, only to find themselves chasing refunds for ghost transactions. This disconnect between payment handlers and booking generation creates severe financial frustration and erodes trust during time-sensitive travel moments. Rebuilding the payment callback handler to reliably generate tickets upon confirmed bank settlement would eliminate these false-negative errors.

evidence.name: RJ
evidence.quote: update 18th May 2026. still The same. I paid and I don't get the ticket. The new app has alot of bugs. the tickets don't update, even after the payment has been deducted it…

evidence.name: MG
evidence.quote: Con l'ultima realese siete stati in grado di peggiorare oltre che l'esperienza utente anche le funzionalità. L'app si blocca nel pagamento e si riavvia se consulti i tuoi…

insights.recommendation: Fix the payment gateway response handling so that successful bank authorizations automatically generate and issue the ticket instead of displaying a false error message.

insights.title: Account synchronization issues cause valid credentials to be rejected by the app while working fine on the website.
insights.summary: Multiple users trying to log in or reset passwords find themselves trapped in endless error loops where the mobile client rejects credentials that the web portal accepts without issue. This points to a fundamental breakdown in synchronization between the mobile application backend and the main user database. Travelers are forced to use web browsers on their phones just to access their profiles or manage bookings. Aligning authentication protocols and database checks between web and mobile platforms will resolve these persistent access roadblocks.

evidence.name: JW
evidence.quote: I set up my account on the website, and using the credentials on the app does not work. Tried resetting multiple times. Useless.

evidence.name: GL
evidence.quote: Used to love this app. Now I can’t log in. I do not use a VPN, have used both cellular and Wi-Fi, and reset my password MANY times. I can log into the website without issue, but…

evidence.name: FE
evidence.quote: Non fa completare l’acquisto del biglietto e non riconosce la password (cambiata tre volte) che invece il sito accetta.

insights.recommendation: Update the mobile authentication service to properly synchronize with the core user database so that valid credentials and password resets work identically across web and app channels.
